name: The Longines Master Collection Moon Phase 40mm
description: A refined expression of Longines' watchmaking mastery, this 40mm timepiece features an elegant moon phase display at 6 o'clock alongside a date indicator. Powered by the automatic L899 calibre with a 72-hour power reserve, it pairs traditional complications with modern reliability.

specs.functions: Hours, minutes, seconds, date, moon phase

name: The Longines Master Collection Chronograph 40mm
description: This versatile chronograph combines a column-wheel mechanism with the L688 automatic movement. The blue sunray dial features three sub-dials for 12-hour, 30-minute, and continuous seconds registers, framed by a polished stainless steel case.

name: The Longines Master Collection GMT 42mm
description: Designed for the modern traveler, this 42mm GMT watch displays a second time zone via a central 24-hour hand and a rotating inner bezel. The L844 automatic movement provides a generous 72-hour power reserve for worry-free travel.

name: The Longines Master Collection Annual Calendar 40mm
description: An impressive annual calendar complication that only requires one manual adjustment per year, on March 1st. The silver barleycorn dial features day, date, and month displays alongside a moon phase indicator, powered by the L897 calibre.

specs.functions: Hours, minutes, seconds, day, date, month, moon phase, annual calendar

name: The Longines Master Collection 42mm
description: The 42mm expression of the Master Collection features a clean, black dial with applied silver-toned indices and a date window at 3 o'clock. The L893 automatic movement with silicon balance spring delivers exceptional accuracy and a 72-hour power reserve.

name: Longines Legend Diver
description: A faithful reissue of the 1960s Longines diving watch, the Legend Diver features a distinctive internal rotating bezel operated by a dedicated crown at 2 o'clock. Its 42mm case, lacquered black dial, and vintage-inspired design have made it a modern classic.

specs.functions: Hours, minutes, seconds, date, internal rotating bezel

name: Longines Heritage Military COSD
description: Inspired by watches Longines produced for the British Ministry of Defence in the 1940s, the Heritage Military features a broad arrow on the dial and the COSD (Chief Ordnance Supply Depot) engraving on the caseback. A faithful tribute to Longines' military watchmaking heritage.

name: Longines Heritage Classic Chronograph 1946
description: This chronograph pays tribute to a Longines model from 1946 with its vintage-inspired cream dial, tachymeter scale, and two sub-dials. The column-wheel chronograph movement provides mechanical sophistication in a refined 40mm case.

specs.functions: Hours, minutes, small seconds, date, chronograph, tachymeter

name: Longines Heritage Diver 1967
description: Reissued to celebrate the 50th anniversary of a landmark Longines diver, the Heritage Diver 1967 combines a cushion-shaped 42mm case with a rotating bezel and date display. Its green dial and vintage aesthetic evoke the spirit of undersea exploration.

specs.functions: Hours, minutes, seconds, date, rotating bezel

name: Longines Heritage Classic Sector Dial
description: Drawing from 1930s Longines designs, the Heritage Classic features a distinctive sector dial that divides the face into radial segments. The warm silver and blue color scheme on a 38.5mm case captures the elegance of pre-war watchmaking with modern automatic reliability.

name: Longines Spirit 40mm
description: The Longines Spirit collection celebrates the brand's pioneering aviation heritage. This 40mm model features a blue sunray dial with luminescent hands and indices, a fluted crown, and the COSC-certified L888.4 automatic movement with silicon balance spring.

name: Longines Spirit 42mm
description: The larger 42mm Spirit features a striking green sunray dial with Super-LumiNova applied indices. Certified as a chronometer by COSC, this pilot-inspired timepiece is delivered with an interchangeable strap system for versatility across adventures.

name: Longines Spirit Zulu Time 42mm
description: A true GMT watch with an independently adjustable local-hour hand and a bidirectional rotating 24-hour ceramic bezel. The Spirit Zulu Time is COSC-certified and features an exclusive L844.4 calibre, making it an ideal companion for world travelers and aviation enthusiasts.

specs.functions: Hours, minutes, seconds, date, GMT, rotating 24-hour bezel

name: Longines Spirit Flyback Chronograph 42mm
description: The pinnacle of the Spirit collection, this flyback chronograph features an L791.4 column-wheel movement with COSC certification. The flyback function allows instant resetting and restarting of the chronograph with a single push, essential for precision timing in aviation.

specs.functions: Hours, minutes, seconds, date, flyback chronograph, tachymeter

name: Longines HydroConquest 41mm
description: The HydroConquest is Longines' flagship diving watch, built for serious underwater performance with 300m water resistance and a unidirectional rotating bezel. The 41mm ceramic-bezel model with blue sunray dial pairs sport capability with everyday wearability.

specs.functions: Hours, minutes, seconds, date, unidirectional rotating bezel

name: Longines HydroConquest 43mm
description: The larger 43mm HydroConquest delivers commanding wrist presence with a black ceramic bezel insert and matching black dial. Rated to 300m, it features a screw-down crown and caseback, luminescent markers, and the reliable L888.5 automatic movement.

specs.functions: Hours, minutes, seconds, date, unidirectional rotating bezel

name: Longines HydroConquest GMT 41mm
description: Combining dive watch capability with GMT functionality, the HydroConquest GMT features a bidirectional 24-hour ceramic bezel for tracking a second time zone. The 41mm case maintains 300m water resistance while adding a useful travel complication.

specs.functions: Hours, minutes, seconds, date, GMT, bidirectional 24-hour bezel

name: Longines Conquest Classic 40mm
description: The Conquest Classic bridges sport and elegance with a refined 40mm case, slim profile, and polished finish. Its silver dial with applied diamond hour markers and date display at 3 o'clock make it equally at home in the office or on the golf course.

name: Longines Conquest V.H.P. 41mm
description: V.H.P. stands for Very High Precision, and this quartz-powered timepiece delivers accuracy to within plus or minus 5 seconds per year. The perpetual calendar and smart crown system automatically reset the hands after any impact or magnetic field exposure.

specs.functions: Hours, minutes, seconds, date, perpetual calendar, GPD system

name: Longines DolceVita 23.3 x 37mm
description: The DolceVita embodies Italian-inspired elegance with its signature rectangular case. This ladies' model features a silver dial with Roman numeral indices and blue steel hands, evoking the glamour of la dolce vita on a steel bracelet.

name: Longines Mini DolceVita 21.5 x 29mm
description: The Mini DolceVita offers the collection's signature rectangular silhouette in a more petite format. With its refined proportions, mother-of-pearl dial, and diamond-set indices, it is a jewel-like timepiece designed for the discerning wrist.

name: La Grande Classique de Longines 36mm
description: An icon of understated elegance since 1992, La Grande Classique is defined by its ultra-slim profile and pure round case. This 36mm version features a white dial with diamond indices and the distinctive thin bezel that has made the collection a design benchmark.

name: La Grande Classique de Longines Automatic 38mm
description: The automatic version of La Grande Classique houses the L888.5 mechanical movement within its famously slim silhouette. The 38.5mm case with a black dial and applied rose gold-toned indices offers mechanical watchmaking in an elegant, dressy package.

name: Longines PrimaLuna 30mm
description: PrimaLuna captures moonlit elegance with its distinctive crown guard and softly curved case. This 30mm model features a mother-of-pearl dial with diamond hour markers, combining Swiss quartz precision with a jewelry-inspired aesthetic for day or evening wear.

name: Longines PrimaLuna Automatic 34mm
description: The automatic PrimaLuna pairs the L592 self-winding movement with the collection's signature round case and crown guard. The 34mm silver dial with Roman numeral indices offers a classic look with the satisfaction of mechanical watchmaking.
